mission_title: Agent Fox Technical Core V1B-0-R2 — Privacy Exclusion Label Self-Check Repair

argv:
from pathlib import Path
import hashlib,json
checks={
 r"Z:\FOXAI\System\AgentFoxTechnicalCore\pc_foxai_baseline_v1.py":(63172,"8c3af6d6f8d5a21a03fbd5c97eabd58280718a195c65f51a2b9201ff84ec798b"),
 r"Z:\FOXAI\System\AgentFoxTechnicalCore\PC_FOXAI_BASELINE_CONTRACT_V1.json":(2459,"b5acf4057471c96c4236c6e2bfda85174e4d20d567b0f4a9047c178664350b52"),
 r"Z:\FOXAI\System\AgentFoxTechnicalCore\README_V1B0.md":(1274,"279b999820eed14c22d840eed4ba47e3eee79ad47a33e28188874d10bc3342db"),
}
for name,(size,digest) in checks.items():
 p=Path(name); data=p.read_bytes(); assert len(data)==size,(name,len(data)); assert hashlib.sha256(data).hexdigest()==digest,name
compile(Path(r"Z:\FOXAI\System\AgentFoxTechnicalCore\pc_foxai_baseline_v1.py").read_text(encoding="utf-8"),"<v1b0-collector>","exec")
unchanged={
 r"Z:\FOXAI\core\foxai_web.py":"d7bf0a2042d55ef7f0a5869556015e42c7427e7ff88636b28e1795f3adf7b952",
 r"Z:\FOXAI\ui\main_window.py":"a9c5bb86878e5f0cd27d221dbb32688b337e6026073a4b66d83339e0aef294a3",
 r"Z:\FOXAI\System\AgentFoxTechnicalCore\self_knowledge_chat_adapter_v1.py":"a80a9047e0eebd9ac87fe4d656c565bc6534563bb3c97e1ad9b59823a36804f7",
 r"Z:\FOXAI\System\AgentFoxTechnicalCore\webui_self_knowledge_integration_v1.py":"765983b563f8495138c9670849de5c4703f4735a0ddc9324efd6580606fc517b",
 r"Z:\FOXAI\System\AgentFoxTechnicalCore\desktop_self_knowledge_integration_v1.py":"e420706136b4902d82d8dbf1fecc64ae70fb8bc639106db41033545f8c196c30",
}
for name,digest in unchanged.items(): assert hashlib.sha256(Path(name).read_bytes()).hexdigest()==digest,name
snap=Path(r"Z:\FOXAI\System\EngineeringWorkshop\snapshots\ENG-20260722-051940-8477D9")
manifests=sorted(snap.glob("snapshot_*.manifest.json")); assert manifests
manifest=json.loads(manifests[-1].read_text(encoding="utf-8")); entries=manifest["entries"]
expected=["System/AgentFoxTechnicalCore/PC_FOXAI_BASELINE_CONTRACT_V1.json","System/AgentFoxTechnicalCore/README_V1B0.md","System/AgentFoxTechnicalCore/pc_foxai_baseline_v1.py"]
assert len(entries)==3,len(entries)
normalized=sorted(row["relative_path"].replace("\\","/") for row in entries)
assert normalized==expected,(normalized,expected)
assert all(row["existed"] is False and row.get("sha256") is None and row.get("size") is None for row in entries)
print("AGENT_FOX_V1B0_R2_SUPPORT_AND_NORMALIZED_SNAPSHOT_OK")
validations.name: Verify exact V1B-0-R2 payloads, unchanged integrations, and normalized three-path snapshot

argv:
from pathlib import Path
import json,subprocess
p=Path(r"Z:\FOXAI\System\AgentFoxTechnicalCore\pc_foxai_baseline_v1.py")
r=subprocess.run([r"Z:/FOXAI/Runtime/Desktop/python/python.exe","-I","-B","-S",str(p),"self-test"],cwd=r"Z:\FOXAI",capture_output=True,text=True,timeout=45)
assert r.returncode==0,(r.stdout,r.stderr)
obj=json.loads(r.stdout)
assert obj["status"]=="ok" and obj["output_count"]==8
assert obj["privacy_exclusion_label_scoped"] is True
assert obj["motherboard_uuid_field_rejected"] is True
assert obj["motherboard_uuid_label_outside_exclusion_rejected"] is True
print(json.dumps(obj,sort_keys=True))

argv:
from pathlib import Path
import json,hashlib,os,re
out=Path(r"Z:\FOXAI\System\EngineeringWorkshop\missions\ENG-20260722-051940-8477D9_V1B0_R2_PC_AND_FOXAI_BASELINE")
names=['HOST_AND_WINDOWS_BASELINE.json', 'ACTIVE_DRIVE_BASELINE.json', 'FOXAI_ACTIVE_WORKSPACE_BASELINE.json', 'PYTHON_RUNTIME_INVENTORY.json', 'PROCESS_RESOURCE_BASELINE.json', 'SERVICE_STARTUP_AND_LISTENER_BASELINE.json', 'PC_BASELINE_OBSERVATIONS.json', 'PC_BASELINE_RECEIPT.json']
assert sorted(p.name for p in out.iterdir() if p.is_file())==sorted(names)
total=0
payloads=[]
for name in names:
 p=out/name; data=p.read_bytes(); payloads.append(data); total+=len(data)
 assert b"\r" not in data,name
 obj=json.loads(data.decode("utf-8")); canonical=(json.dumps(obj,indent=2,sort_keys=True,ensure_ascii=False)+"\n").encode("utf-8")
 assert data==canonical,name
assert total<16*1024*1024,total
joined=b"\n".join(payloads).lower()
for value in (os.environ.get("USERPROFILE"),os.environ.get("USERNAME")):
 if value: assert value.encode("utf-8",errors="ignore").lower() not in joined,"profile marker leaked"
text=joined.decode("utf-8",errors="replace")
assert not re.search(r'(?i)C:\\Users\\(?!<REDACTED>)',text)
assert '"environment_variable_values"' not in text
assert '"full_command_line"' not in text

objects=[json.loads(payload.decode("utf-8")) for payload in payloads]
allowed_label_count=0
def walk(value,path=()):
 global allowed_label_count
 if isinstance(value,dict):
  for key,item in value.items():
   normalized=str(key).strip().lower()
   if normalized=="sensitive_identifiers_excluded":
    assert isinstance(item,list) and all(isinstance(label,str) for label in item)
    allowed_label_count+=sum(label.strip().lower()=="motherboard_uuid" for label in item)
    continue
   assert normalized not in {"motherboard_uuid","baseboard_uuid","board_uuid","system_uuid","hardware_uuid","device_uuid"},(path,key)
   assert not ("motherboard" in normalized and "uuid" in normalized),(path,key)
   walk(item,path+(str(key),))
 elif isinstance(value,list):
  for index,item in enumerate(value): walk(item,path+(str(index),))
 elif isinstance(value,str):
  assert value.strip().lower()!="motherboard_uuid",path
for obj in objects: walk(obj)
assert allowed_label_count==1,allowed_label_count
print(json.dumps({"status":"canonical_privacy_outputs_ok","count":len(names),"total_bytes":total}))
validations.name: Validate exact eight canonical outputs, privacy redaction, and scoped exclusion declaration

argv:
from pathlib import Path
import json
out=Path(r"Z:\FOXAI\System\EngineeringWorkshop\missions\ENG-20260722-051940-8477D9_V1B0_R2_PC_AND_FOXAI_BASELINE")
host=json.loads((out/"HOST_AND_WINDOWS_BASELINE.json").read_text(encoding="utf-8"))
drives=json.loads((out/"ACTIVE_DRIVE_BASELINE.json").read_text(encoding="utf-8"))
workspace=json.loads((out/"FOXAI_ACTIVE_WORKSPACE_BASELINE.json").read_text(encoding="utf-8"))
py=json.loads((out/"PYTHON_RUNTIME_INVENTORY.json").read_text(encoding="utf-8"))
required={"record_id","subject","availability_status","collection_method","collected_at","provenance","facts"}
for obj in (host,drives,workspace,py):
 for row in obj.get("records",[]): assert required.issubset(row),row.get("subject")
roots=[row["facts"].get("drive_root") for row in drives["records"]]
assert roots==["C:\\","Z:\\","S:\\"],roots
assert all(not str(root).upper().startswith("K:") for root in roots)
z=next(row for row in drives["records"] if row["facts"].get("drive_root")=="Z:\\")
assert z["availability_status"]=="available" and str(z["facts"].get("filesystem")).upper()=="NTFS"
active=next(row for row in workspace["records"] if row["subject"]=="active_foxai_workspace")
assert active["facts"]["exists"] is True and active["facts"]["active_build_workspace"] is True and active["facts"]["filesystem_is_ntfs"] is True
known=next(row for row in workspace["records"] if row["subject"]=="known_good_source_and_component_hashes")
assert len(known["facts"]["files"])==5 and all(x["exists"] and x["sha256_matches_expected"] for x in known["facts"]["files"])
available=[row for row in py["records"] if row["availability_status"]=="available"]
assert available
assert any(str(row["facts"].get("path","")).lower().endswith(r"runtime\desktop\python\python.exe") for row in available)
for row in available:
 facts=row["facts"]
 for key in ("version","implementation","architecture_bits","prefix","base_prefix","no_site","no_user_site","site_imported_by_default","sys_path","classification"): assert key in facts,(row["subject"],key)
print(json.dumps({"status":"host_drive_workspace_python_coverage_ok","python_available":len(available)}))
validations.name: Validate host, drive, active workspace, and Python runtime coverage

argv:
from pathlib import Path
import json,re
out=Path(r"Z:\FOXAI\System\EngineeringWorkshop\missions\ENG-20260722-051940-8477D9_V1B0_R2_PC_AND_FOXAI_BASELINE")
proc=json.loads((out/"PROCESS_RESOURCE_BASELINE.json").read_text(encoding="utf-8"))
ssl=json.loads((out/"SERVICE_STARTUP_AND_LISTENER_BASELINE.json").read_text(encoding="utf-8"))
assert len(proc.get("records",[]))<=500
for row in proc.get("records",[]):
 facts=row["facts"]; assert "command_line" not in facts and facts.get("full_command_line_recorded") is False
 path=str(facts.get("executable_path_redacted") or "")
 assert not re.search(r'(?i)C:\\Users\\(?!<REDACTED>)',path)
assert len(ssl["services"]["records"])<=600
assert len(ssl["startup_items"]["records"])<=200
assert len(ssl["local_listeners"]["records"])<=500
assert ssl["startup_items"]["arguments_recorded"] is False
for row in ssl["startup_items"]["records"]:
 assert row["facts"]["arguments_recorded"] is False and "command" not in row["facts"]
for row in ssl["local_listeners"]["records"]:
 facts=row["facts"]; assert facts["protocol"] in ("TCP","UDP") and facts["remote_connection_attempted"] is False
 assert facts["address_classification"] in ("loopback_only","wildcard_externally_bound","link_local","specific_interface_bound","unclassified")
assert ssl["local_listeners"]["remote_hosts_probed"] is False and ssl["local_listeners"]["packet_capture_performed"] is False
assert ssl["changes_performed"]=={"services":False,"startup":False,"listeners":False}
print(json.dumps({"status":"process_service_startup_listener_bounds_ok","process_rows":len(proc.get("records",[])),"service_rows":len(ssl["services"]["records"]),"listener_rows":len(ssl["local_listeners"]["records"])}))
validations.name: Validate bounded process, service, startup, and local-listener evidence

argv:
from pathlib import Path
import json
out=Path(r"Z:\FOXAI\System\EngineeringWorkshop\missions\ENG-20260722-051940-8477D9_V1B0_R2_PC_AND_FOXAI_BASELINE")
obs=json.loads((out/"PC_BASELINE_OBSERVATIONS.json").read_text(encoding="utf-8"))
allowed={"observed_fact","potential_attention_item","unavailable","not_evaluated"}
assert obs["overall_health_label_assigned"] is False
assert obs["malware_or_damage_diagnosis_performed"] is False
assert obs["repair_or_deletion_recommendations_included"] is False
assert obs["records"]
for row in obs["records"]:
 assert row["classification"] in allowed and row["diagnostic_conclusion"] is False and row["repair_recommendation"] is False
 message=row["message"].lower()
 assert not any(term in message for term in ("pc is healthy","pc is unhealthy","infected","computer is broken","delete this","run repair"))
 assert isinstance(row["evidence_record_ids"],list)
print(json.dumps({"status":"bounded_observation_layer_ok","observations":len(obs["records"])}))
validations.name: Validate observation labels remain evidence-linked and non-diagnostic

argv:
from pathlib import Path
import hashlib,json
out=Path(r"Z:\FOXAI\System\EngineeringWorkshop\missions\ENG-20260722-051940-8477D9_V1B0_R2_PC_AND_FOXAI_BASELINE")
receipt=json.loads((out/"PC_BASELINE_RECEIPT.json").read_text(encoding="utf-8"))
assert receipt["status"]=="baseline_collected_read_only" and receipt["exact_output_count_including_receipt"]==8
assert receipt["collection_audit"]["rollback_drive_accessed"] is False
assert receipt["collection_audit"]["network_connections_initiated"] is False
assert receipt["collection_audit"]["packet_capture_performed"] is False
assert receipt["collection_audit"]["child_process_count"]<=64
allowed={"powershell.exe","pwsh.exe","powershell","pwsh","python.exe","pythonw.exe"}
assert all(str(row["executable_name"]).lower() in allowed for row in receipt["collection_audit"]["child_processes"])
for entry in receipt["collection_audit"]["entries"]:
 source=str(entry.get("source") or ""); assert not source.upper().startswith("K:")
assert all(value is False for value in receipt["changes"].values())
assert receipt["privacy"]["profile_names_redacted"] is True
assert receipt["privacy"]["command_line_arguments_recorded"] is False
assert receipt["privacy"]["environment_variable_values_recorded"] is False
assert receipt["overall_pc_health_conclusion"]=="not_assigned"
assert receipt["diagnostic_or_repair_actions_performed"] is False
unchanged={
 r"Z:\FOXAI\core\foxai_web.py":"d7bf0a2042d55ef7f0a5869556015e42c7427e7ff88636b28e1795f3adf7b952",
 r"Z:\FOXAI\ui\main_window.py":"a9c5bb86878e5f0cd27d221dbb32688b337e6026073a4b66d83339e0aef294a3",
 r"Z:\FOXAI\System\AgentFoxTechnicalCore\self_knowledge_chat_adapter_v1.py":"a80a9047e0eebd9ac87fe4d656c565bc6534563bb3c97e1ad9b59823a36804f7",
 r"Z:\FOXAI\System\AgentFoxTechnicalCore\webui_self_knowledge_integration_v1.py":"765983b563f8495138c9670849de5c4703f4735a0ddc9324efd6580606fc517b",
 r"Z:\FOXAI\System\AgentFoxTechnicalCore\desktop_self_knowledge_integration_v1.py":"e420706136b4902d82d8dbf1fecc64ae70fb8bc639106db41033545f8c196c30",
}
for name,digest in unchanged.items(): assert hashlib.sha256(Path(name).read_bytes()).hexdigest()==digest,name
assert sum((out/name).stat().st_size for name in ['HOST_AND_WINDOWS_BASELINE.json', 'ACTIVE_DRIVE_BASELINE.json', 'FOXAI_ACTIVE_WORKSPACE_BASELINE.json', 'PYTHON_RUNTIME_INVENTORY.json', 'PROCESS_RESOURCE_BASELINE.json', 'SERVICE_STARTUP_AND_LISTENER_BASELINE.json', 'PC_BASELINE_OBSERVATIONS.json', 'PC_BASELINE_RECEIPT.json'])<16*1024*1024
print(json.dumps({"status":"read_only_safety_receipt_ok","child_processes":receipt["collection_audit"]["child_process_count"]}))
validations.name: Validate read-only safety receipt, bounded collectors, unchanged integrations, and size ceiling
